offer: For insurance claims processors handling 50–100 claims/month, inefficient extraction causes delayed claim processing. We automate form extraction instead of manual data entry and formatting.
problem: Inefficient extraction and formatting of insurance claim forms from scanned documents.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance claims processors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 insurance claims processors with demo
Community forums where claims processors share tools
try_it: Let users try manual-first data extraction on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
